user.title: Connect evcc
user.description: evcc will be reached by Home Assistant itself, not by your browser. Cards should point their `url` at `/api/evcc_proxy/<slug>` afterwards.

data.url: evcc URL (as reached from Home Assistant)
data.slug: Path slug (optional, defaults to the URL)

error.slug_in_use: That slug is already used by another evcc proxy instance.

abort.already_configured: This evcc instance (slug) is already configured.

data.url: evcc URL (as reached from Home Assistant)
